summary.summary: Updated the Xcode project file Trio.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj to reorganize project entries (commit:90dd1b0e509c). The PBXBuildFile section was modified: many source-file build entries were added and existing entries were reordered or relocated within the section (file:82ae38a95a23, diff:8e10b4701fdc). The PBXFileReference section was also updated with many added Swift source file references and reorganization of existing references (diff:8e10b4701fdc). The commit subject is "reorganize project" (commit:90dd1b0e509c).
summary.userFacingImpact: No direct user-visible behavior changes are shown in the project diff; the changes are to the Xcode project file and file references and therefore primarily affect project organization and build configuration (diff:8e10b4701fdc, file:82ae38a95a23). Human review is recommended to confirm build/CI integration and to ensure no files were unintentionally removed or mis-referenced (diff:8e10b4701fdc).
